title: Show Mob Names
description: Displays mob nametags without needing to look directly at the mob.
body:
This is a simple client side mod that displays the name of nametagged mobs without needing to look directly at the mob. Perfect for locating named mobs among other mobs or for taking screenshots of named mobs. Works in singleplayer and on servers!

Base Functionality
- shows the name above the mob if the player has a direct line of sight to the mob
- does not show names through blocks

![Mob names showing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f54a897e4691646fe50840242f6bb8897d750bf9_0.webp)

Optional Dependency: Modmenu

Options enabled through Modmenu
- turn mod functionality on or off in-game
- toggle to show mob names through blocks (just like how player names show through blocks)

Required Dependency: Fabric API
